Location: Las Vegas, NV — Open to Remote
About: Senior Software Developer specialized in .NET MAUI, Blazor Software Development, and Sports Betting. I am committed to and take pride in developing quality software products. I excel at problem solving, leadership, teamwork, and adaptability.

Roles.Title: Senior Software Engineer
Bullets: Continued leading mobile development efforts on Circa Sports' MAUI Blazor Mobile and Desktop real money Sports Betting app, issuing large quarterly updates.

Continued to concept and create new innovative features in the Sports Betting industry which resulted in increased user engagement and reception — including a stats tracker on win/losses, create quick parlay by shaking your phone, and the ability to track bets by various categories.

Roles.Title: Mobile Developer
Bullets: Responsible for leading mobile development efforts on Circa Sports' MAUI Blazor Mobile and Desktop Sports Betting app from conception to release.

Creator of the "Round Robin Parlay Inspector" — a new and first-of-its-kind feature in Sports Betting focusing on transparency and unraveling confusing aspects of round robins by showing bet item groupings per "by" and the potential win on each parlay.

Roles.Title: Software Developer
Bullets: Lead developer on "EPRO Mobile" — a .NET MAUI XAML Mobile procure-to-pay application on the Apple App Store and Google Play Store, brought from concept phase to live production with constant new features and fixes.
Created innovative features including a liquid level detector using the phone's camera and AI for auto re-ordering based on predicted consumption levels.
Adhered to the company's stack by developing a Delphi Berlin API to communicate between EPRO Mobile and the backend.
Assisted with development of ReactorNet's procure-to-pay application built in Delphi.
